subject: Equity Law
module: Breach of Trust and Equitable Remedies

lessons.title: Breach of Trust Personal Liability and Defences
lessons.description: A trustee commits a breach of trust where they act in a manner inconsistent with their duties — whether by taking an unauthorised act, or by failing to take a required act.

lessons.title: Third Party Liability Knowing Receipt and Dishonest Assistance
lessons.description: There are two heads of liability: knowing receipt and dishonest assistance.
